review_title: Solid and flexible Delphi components for MySQL and MariaDB access
description: Connecting my Delphi app to a MariaDB database on my webserver is key to my business. MySQL Data Access Components does that well.
author: David M.
pros: The components work. They are both powerful and flexible. I don't know of any bugs, and support is good when I do need help.
cons: The Help could be a bit better. But, if I have questions, they are quickly answered on the support forum.

description: I use MySQL with Delphi VCL. I don't experience any problems during the software or application's operation. It's also a very accessible component. Other components I used previously caused problems.
author: Nedret P.
pros: It's very easy to install, I've been using it for 15 years and it has never broken down. I'm immediately notified of updates, and the setup is very easy.
cons: There wasn't a single data access component I particularly liked. I'm writing this because I have to write something; here's the price of the product.

author: Petr K.
pros: Positive: 1) Native direct access to MySQL without DLL library client2) Easy access to embedded local database3) Good compatibility MySQL 5 - 84) Stability, no problems
cons: Delphi IDE components edit - Very small font on high DPI monitors:(

review_title: MySQL Data Access Components - The Best Choice
description: I have been using MySQL Data Access Components since 2004, it was the best choice I made, the components are incredible, the documentation is detailed, the examples are complete and Devart support is incredible, and they also have a forum where we can resolve any questions. I have been using MyDAC for 21 years, it was the best choice I made,
author: Eduardo S.
pros: The components are fast, the documentation is rich, the support is amazing, the forum is very good
cons: I like everything, I've been using it for 21 years

review_title: Rock-Solid MySQL Access for Delphi – Fast and Reliable for 15+ Years
description: I’ve been using MyDAC for over 15 years—since the MySQL 5.0 days—and it has never let me down. It’s fast, dependable, and evolves with the tools I use. Whether for desktop or server-side Delphi apps, it consistently delivers. It's a key part of my development stack and has made working with MySQL in Delphi effortless over the years.
author: charles F.
pros: - Extremely reliable and stable across MySQL and Delphi versions - Excellent performance with both simple and complex queries - Long-term compatibility and regular updates - Easy to integrate and use in Delphi project
cons: - nothing significant. Occasionally waiting for support for newer Delphi versions, but it's usually added quickly.

review_title: Fast and Secure MySQL Access in Delphi with MyDAC After 5+ Years of Use
description: I’ve been using MyDAC in Delphi projects and it has proven to be a very reliable and efficient way to connect directly to MySQL. It’s fast, lightweight, and avoids the overhead of ODBC or ADO. The components integrate smoothly with RAD Studio, and working with datasets and transactions feels very natural. In combination with SecureBridge, I’ve also used MyDAC to connect over SSL, which was straightforward to set up and worked flawlessly. The stability in production and the performance benefits are excellent, and the documentation makes it easy to get started. Overall, MyDAC saves a lot of development time and is definitely worth the money if you’re building professional Delphi applications with MySQL.
author: Kiril Z.
pros: Fast, stable, easy to use, well-documented, works with SecureBridge for SSL, and saves a lot of development time.
cons: It is a paid library, but given its reliability, ease of use, and the time it saves, it is worth every penny.

author: david O.
pros: I m using Mydac with Delphi since more than 10 years and i m satisfy with the Mydac components , each year i update with new version

author: Zsolt C.
pros: It is easy to use and very handy, one of the best in the market.
cons: The software is great, but the support doesn't answer the questions as the support of other software components. It is not unusual to wait many days for an answer.

review_title: Using more than 7 years and still
description: Good, i am using for more than 7 years now and still.
author: Khaled A.
pros: Durable, just works with no complications or unexpected errors. Updates on every new Delphi version.
cons: Updates sometimes delays on new version updates. Little bugs appeared over years, but they have fixes quick

description: Behind Delphi itself, this is the component I use most in my daily work.
author: Israel P.
pros: Fast native access Easy to use Several and useful components since a connection to batch operations
cons: A lot or years using it and I can not remember any negative point

description: Spart viel zeit beim programmieren. Arbeitet zuverlässig, Die beste library für andriod firemonkey
author: Wolfgang G.
pros: Fehlerfrei funktionalität. Leichte installation.
cons: Düftiges handbuch, beispiele zu wenig, Bestr service ist ein guter ersatz

review_title: MySQL-Komponenten von Devart sind optimal für Deplhi
author: Manfred P.
pros: Einfache Programmierung mit den Komponenten von Devart
cons: Die Preise liegen über dem Durchschnitt für Zugriffskomponenten

author: Heiko T.
pros: Es greift direkt auf MySQL oder MariaDB zu ohne andere Treiber zu benutzen. Dadurch werden meine Anwendungen sehr kompakt.
cons: Zugegeben ich benötige für die neueste Delphi Version immer auch eine aktuelle MyDAC Komponente.

description: I have been using MySQL Data Access Components for 14 years
author: Muhammet L.
pros: I am very pleased with the speed and performance of the MySQL Data Access Components that I use.
cons: MySQL Data Access Components There are no cons for me

description: Very satisfied over al the years, as an early Delphi adopter I'm using MySQL Data Access in all new versions, never had an update problem with never versions.
author: Ulco V.
pros: I'm using it for many years, updates are never an issue, always compatible with all source lines.
cons: Performance is great, the database drivers are linked into the executable, which makes updating my applications seamless and easy.

description: Simply put, I like to use it and it makes my work a lot easier
author: Jesus R.
pros: Just the fact that this software exists is a big plus. The good description in the manuals
cons: From my point of view, there is hardly anything I could complain about. The price could still be a bit cheaper, since it is a subscription process that comes to a not small price in the long run. Possibly one could make special favorable prices for long-standing customers/users. Similar to a price scale according to user years. e.g. Update after 5 years of use x% Update after 6 years of use y%.

review_title: Principales características de MyDAC y razones para usarlo
author: Patricio A.
pros: Lo más importante de este componente es la facilidad de uso, rapidez de procesamiento y facilidad de hacer un Upgrade
cons: Me gusta absolutamente todo, no tengo quejas

description: Nous n'avons pas de problème de gestion des bases de données en générale.Il arrive dans certain programme qu'un message d'erreur survienne le matin lorsque le programme est resté allumé toute la nuit. Mais je ne sais pas si cela vient du composant MySql
author: Philippe L.
pros: La facilité en générale, la stabilité du produit et la facilité d'accès à la base de donnée
cons: Le message qui arrive a chaque démarrage de Delphi lorsqu'une nouvelle version est disponible.Le fait de devoir supprimer l'ancienne version avant de pouvoir installer la nouvelle.

description: I would highly recommend this component to anyone. Devart support and upgrades to the product are a definite plus.
author: Peter V.
pros: Being new to the Delphi world, this component was easy to integrate into my Delphi Project. If I had a problem, it was easily and quickly resolved by the tech support.
cons: At this point, I have none to report for this product.

description: At a very small development company and user it is correct and useful. I have no experience in big systems with large amounts of data.
author: Joan P.
pros: How easy was to implement it in my applications to access MySQL databases
cons: Sometimes it is difficult to find information about properties or "howto's" when you are developing.

description: This component is one of the main pillars in our wholesale business. We communicate with MySQL databases used for logistic procedures.
author: Daan V.
pros: I realy love the plug and play way of using this components. I mean the visual binding to labels for example or just a simple for each loop in the data set. It's just simple and super stable in all it's needs
cons: Backwards incompatible versions when i work with older versions of Delphi (on other dev PC)

review_title: why i choose MySQL Data Access Components
author: Tounekti A.
pros: i have been using MySQL DAC for more than a 2 years, as a company we are satisfied to stay working with it.
cons: Honestly, by our experience 2 years experience there is anything to complain about.

review_title: Does what it says it will.
description: If you use regular ADO table and query components, then you will have no problems using these components.
author: Richard S.
pros: Ease of implementation. It is fairly seamless.
cons: Renewal price. I am a firm believer that renewal prices should be one third or less of the initial licensing fee.

review_title: Get MySQL Data from your application: the easy way
description: I use MySQL Data component in order to get some information from a MySQL database and transfer them into a MS SQL one. Since the years I'm using it I've not had any problem.
author: Eros B.
pros: With MySQL is easy to connect to any database and take access to all the tables you have right to use. Connect database and tables is made simply and quick
cons: I report no cons about this Delphi component. As all the others one of this kind (like for example UNIDAC, SDAC and so on) it works fine for my needs

author: Johann A.
pros: DAC is quite easy to install and has been reliable for many years of use
cons: The documentation and the help system could be improved
